name: RIS Freshness Refresh

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job freshness_refresh

notes: RIS PILOT SCOPE: Calls research-scheduler run-job freshness_refresh. Runs freshness tier recalculation weekly on Sundays at 02:00. CAVEAT: Internally re-scans recent academic content (ArXiv only). No optional dependencies required. MUTUAL EXCLUSION: Do NOT activate this cron trigger while APScheduler (ris-scheduler container) is running -- this causes double-scheduling. Stop APScheduler first: docker compose stop ris-scheduler. Do NOT add strategy, gate, risk, or live capital logic to this workflow. See docs/adr/0013-ris-n8n-pilot-scoped.md for scope boundaries. Command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job freshness_refresh.
